title.en: Ye Tian didn't know this place,

content.en:
"This is the Stone of Destruction. The Red Ancient Demon introduced, "The Stone of Destruction is the only thing that can enter the Realm of Destruction. "

"The Realm of Destruction?"

Ye Tian didn't know this place,

The Realm of Immortal Ancient Demon also introduced: "The Realm of Destruction is a strange place attached to the Abyss of Aromu, similar to the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield, but not as huge as the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield, but the resources of the Friction Realm are incomparably large, and even has treasure resources that even the peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses can only dream of. For example, the resources on the exchange list of Huoxi's space-time battlefield are all from the Death Realm. "

"The Realm of Destruction has so many resources!"

Ye Tian was a little interested.

Immediately afterwards, the Realm Red Ancient Demon said: "The Friction Stones that appear in the Realm of Destruction are very rare, and at the beginning, a few Friction Stones accidentally fell into the Abyss of Aromu, which allowed several peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses to enter, and later there were peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses who obtained new Friction Stones from the Realm of Friction. However, the Stone of Destruction can only allow an Ancient Demon-level powerhouse to enter the Realm of Destruction three times, and it will dissipate after three times. This Destruction Stone has been used twice, and it can be used once. But even if it can only be used once, it still makes countless top ancient demon-level powerhouses eager for it. Except for those peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, only a very small number of top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses have any hope of obtaining the Friction Stone. "

Ye Tian asked again, "Is there a Nightmare Rama Flower in the Realm of Mortality?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Naturally, there is!" the Realm Red Ancient Demon nodded, "The Nightmare Rama Flower is originally a special resource of the Realm of Destruction, but this thing is of great use to a top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse like me to attack a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, but it should not be of much use to the Heavenly Ancient Demon Lord." ~"

Ye Tian was excited, if there was really a Nightmare Rama Flower in the Realm of Mortality, wouldn't he be able to quickly improve his strength if he found a few more Nightmare Rama Flowers there!

Such a good thing—he didn't want to let it go!

"How much does this Death Stone cost?"

Ye Tian asked.

Seeing that Ye Tian's heart was moved, the Realm Red Ancient Demon held back the excitement in his heart and said a price that was not too high.

And this price is indeed an extremely high price for ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses, and it is also a price that cannot be paid.

But Ye Tian is very rich, and this resource is still taken out.

However, before the transaction, he still communicated with Proz to make sure that there was no problem with what the Realm Red Ancient Demon said, so he made the transaction.

After the transaction was completed, Ye Tian and Proz met again.

......

"God, I was really surprised that the Golden God Department actually traded you a Killing Stone. Pleoz said.

"Master Plotz, don't you have the Stone of Death?"

Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

Proz shook his head, "I don't have the Stone of Destruction, I was too badly injured and fell into a deep sleep, I have been healing for countless years, you know when I woke up, and I have never left the territory of the Dragons. And the new Immortal Stone can only be obtained from the Immortal Realm, each of which is extremely precious, and ordinary peak ancient demon-level powerhouses will not take it out and trade it. It is unlikely that the Boundary Red Ancient Demon has the Stone of Destruction, it should have been taken out by the guy who destroyed the Golden Ancient Demon. "

Ye Tian also guessed that it was the Killing Stone taken out by the Golden Exterminator Ancient Demon, a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, otherwise how could the weak Realm Red Ancient Demon get such a treasure.

"Be careful, maybe the Golden God Department really wants to understand cause and effect, or maybe it has something else in mind. There are also killings in the realm of moles, and if you enter the realm of moles, there is still a risk of falling. Of course, those who can enter the realm of Destruction are the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses and top-level ancient demon-level powerhouses of the main department of Aluo Mother or the tribes under her command, and there will be no life and death killings under normal circumstances, but just in case. "

Pleoz reminded.

"Thank you, Lord Pleoz, for reminding me, I know. "

Ye Tiandao.

However, even if the Golden God Department has bad intentions, he still wants to enter the realm of Mortality, there are too many good things there, and once he enters, there will undoubtedly be a lot of gains.

That's why the Stone of Death is so precious!

......

Golden God Department.

The Realm Red Ancient Demon came back to report and informed the Golden Extermination Ancient Demon of the news that Ye Tian had traded.

"Very good, the Heavenly Ancient Demon will definitely be reluctant to give up the opportunity of the Friction Realm, and he will definitely enter. As long as he goes in and I find him, with my strength, it will be too easy to kill a top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse who has just broken through!"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon said confidently.

Don't look at Ye Tian's slaughter in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, but it was the Huoxi space-time battlefield, the strength of the ancient demon-level powerhouse was suppressed, the higher the cultivation, the more powerful it was suppressed, and the Friction Realm did not suppress the strength.

In the realm of friction, he can exert 100% combat power.

How can a mere top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse compete with him? He can't even run!

Time flies, and another period of time has passed.

Over the years, Ye Tian has perfected the incomplete Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane Demon Remnant Blade a bit, at least with fewer side effects, and its power has increased by three points.

In addition, his various form secret methods have made some progress, and the most improved is the Ten Thousand Forms Secret Method, which he has cultivated to the fourth form Dacheng realm, and it won't be long before he can break through to the fourth form circle realm.

As for the other form secret methods, most of them are in the fourth form Xiaocheng realm.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's several Fourth Form Secret Methods successively reached the Dacheng Realm and the Consummation Realm.

Perhaps for a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, this time was not long, but Ye Tian had made rapid progress, and his strength had improved by leaps and bounds.

this day.

The realm of Destruction is finally about to open.

......

The Abyss of Arromu.

Mountain of Destruction.

A pinnacle Ancient Demon-level powerhouse came here, and there were a few top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

Wow!!!

Ye Tian shuttled here, and saw the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse who had already come here, the Golden Annihilation Ancient Demon.

In addition to this familiar peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, he also met several peak ancient demon-level powerhouses who had entered the Huoxi space-time battlefield in the main department of Arrow Mother.

At this time, one after another strong men held the Friction Stone, waiting for the Friction Realm to open.

Bang!!!!!

A huge boundary gate appeared, and an ancient demon-level powerhouse passed through the boundary gate with the Friction Stone in his hand.

Ye Tian also passed through with this Killing Stone in his hand, and at the moment of passing through, the power of the Killing Stone was quickly consumed, and finally turned into ashes, which also meant that the last chance of this Killing Stone was used up.

Airplanes!!!

Space-time warp.

Ye Tian stepped into the realm of friction and did not perceive any suppression.

"You have to find treasure resources quickly!"

Ye Tian muttered corpse.
